needs.summary: Platform-wide business and subscription headcounts: total registered businesses (all plans including starter) and count of active paid subscriptions; the page derives paid-share percent client-side.
fields: activePaidSubscriptions (count of Subscription where status=active and plan != starter)
needs.filters/actions: aggregate counts, no filters exposed on screen

needs.summary: Current MRR in kobo: monthly recurring subscription revenue across the rev 2 five-plan ladder (market/business/wholesale flat prices plus enterprise band amounts).
fields: mrrKobo (sum of active subscription monthly price in kobo, enterprise contributions from band pricing)

needs.summary: Credits burned in the current calendar month across all businesses (unified OweMe credits: reminders, voice parses, AI insights).
needs.filters/actions: filter: entry type = burn/debit, period = current month; aggregated across all usage kinds

needs.summary: Pay-link recovery money for the current month: gross amount recovered to businesses via pay links and the OweMe commission share of pay-link fees, both integer kobo.
fields: recoveredThisMonthKobo (sum of successful pay-link payment amounts)
needs.filters/actions: filter: payment status = successful, period = current month

needs.summary: Weekly pay-link recovery time series: 12 weekly totals in kobo, oldest week first, feeding the sparkline; the page derives latest-week value and week-over-week percent change client-side.
fields: weeklyRecoveredKobo (array of 12 weekly sums, oldest first)
needs.filters/actions: group by ISO week over trailing 12 weeks, successful payments only

needs.summary: Current business count per plan across the full five-tier ladder: starter, market, business, wholesale, enterprise.
needs.filters/actions: group businesses by current plan; must include starter (free) businesses

needs.summary: Recent platform event feed: latest cross-domain events with business name, human-readable event label, severity/category tone, and timestamp. Fixture event vocabulary: business registered, plan upgrade, subscription renewed, credit bundle purchased, BVUM ceiling hit, payout account verified. Screen sorts descending by time and shows 10.
needs.filters/actions: latest N (screen uses 10), sorted newest first; either a persisted event/audit stream or a union view over the source domains
